Currently architecting AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly aligned with emerging technical requirements of the role
Strong engineering culture with proven commitment to testing, TDD, and code quality through open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and educational initiatives

response.justification: The candidate brings strong full-stack expertise directly aligned with the primary technical stack and is currently architecting AI agent infrastructure at re:cinq, demonstrating senior-level execution and alignment with emerging requirements. His 15+ years of experience, deep testing culture, and proven ability to learn diverse technologies make him well-suited for the role. However, specific framework expertise (Nest.js, Vitest) and cloud platform operational depth are not clearly documented, which may require onboarding in initial months.
